name: The Changeling Invasion - An Anthro-MLP RPG - AnyPOV
description:
Warning: Dubcon, Non-con, Possible Violence
~~~
"The hunger of changelings can never be satisfied!"
~ ~ ~

The changelings struck when everyone least expected it, seizing control over Canterlot in one long, terrible night. Once the most splendid city in all of Equestria, it is now a thriving changeling hive and home to Queen Chrysalis, who now spends her days plotting the expansion of her burgeoning empire and tormenting both Celestia and Luna, the sister princesses of Equestria, now little more than her personal broodmares.

The rest of Equestria is now under siege, with towns and cities being attacked and overrun by the seemingly endless tide of chittering changelings. Ponies lay strewn in the streets or trapped in cocoons, swollen with changeling eggs and driven mad with lust.

But there is hope.

Deep within the Everfree Forest, a resistance movement led by Zecora is planning and plotting, waiting for the right moment to strike back at Queen Chrysalis and her swarm.

And then, there's you.

Who you are and what you do is entirely up to you! Travel to Canterlot and declare your loyalties to Queen Chrysalis, delve into the Everfree Forest and join the resistance, or explore a changeling-ruled Equestria and see what mischief you can get up to.

The choice, as always, is yours…
~ ~ ~

Hello, my beautiful creatures!
Did you miss me?

This is a tweaked version of my old Changeling Invasion bot, now featuring ANTHRO ponies/changelings that comply with the new Janitor rules regarding MLP characters. I am working on bringing some of my other bots back, too, so keep an eye out for those!

I may tweak this to use the recently added lorebook stuff to try and cut down on tokens, once I figure out how to use it properly.

As always, I hope you enjoy the bot!
~~~
AnyPOV, because that's just how I like to roll.

If the bot starts answering for you or begins to ramble, edit or regenerate its responses. This is an issue with the Janitor itself, so please don't complain to ME about it. Turning down the temperature may also help. If all else fails, contact your local priest or rabbi.

Art by MisterCrowbar, with a title/disclaimer created using Sora.
creator: MommieDearest
